remaining_params.SpellDescription: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

params.Description: As long as you control a Giant, you may cast CARDNAME from your graveyard by paying {U} rather than paying its mana cost. If you cast CARDNAME this way and it would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.
